about.title: About Me
about.p1: With over 5 years of experience as a full-stack developer, I specialize in building scalable architectures and optimizing performance, with a strong focus on frontend technologies.
about.p2: I am passionate about solving complex technical challenges and mentoring developers to align technical execution with business outcomes. My goal is to create applications that enhance user experience and efficiency through collaborative leadership and innovative problem-solving.

chat.initial_message: Hi! I'm Burak's AI assistant. Ask me anything about his experience or skills!

projects.title: Products & Public Build Work
projects.subtitle: Shipped products first, with a lightweight GitHub signal for recent public engineering activity.
projects.showcaseDescription: Independent product builds positioned as production-readiness, system-design, security, and release-hardening case studies.

ritualgymtracker.summary: Mobile-first workout tracking app focused on offline behavior, guest-to-auth migration, streak correctness, timezone-safe analytics, and release-readiness validation.
focus: Guest-to-authenticated account migration without data loss
Streak and timezone correctness across DST and travel

bookmarkanalyzer.summary: Local-first bookmark intelligence app focused on bookmark organization, AI-assisted enrichment, reader experience, and security hardening.
focus: Local-first storage with progressive AI enrichment
SSRF-hardened fetch path for remote metadata
Security headers and rate-limiting for public endpoints

subtrackerrr.summary: Subscription and spending tracker focused on financial correctness, currency handling, Firebase auth/session safety, and data persistence integrity.
focus: Financial correctness across currencies and billing cycles
Firestore schema and persistence integrity checks

fintrackerrr.summary: Portfolio analytics dashboard focused on asset insights, dividend calendar, data normalization, UI performance, and investment-focused summaries.
focus: Normalized data model across heterogeneous asset feeds
Investment-focused insight panels and dividend calendar
UI performance work for large portfolio tables
